options.content: HTTP page probe view only (`subject_type='service'`, `metric =~ /^service.http_page_/`). Latency is measured from the Graphyard agent host; when redirects are followed, TTFB includes redirect time before the final response.

panels.description: Time to first byte and total response time for the Wersdoerfer homepage probe.

targets.query: SELECT mean("value") AS "ttfb_seconds" FROM "graphyard_metrics" WHERE $timeFilter AND "collector_host" =~ /^$collector_host$/ AND "source_instance" =~ /^$source_instance$/ AND "subject_type" = 'service' AND "subject_id" = 'wersdoerfer_homepage' AND "source_system" = 'http_probe' AND "metric" = 'service.http_page_ttfb_seconds' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("value") AS "total_seconds" FROM "graphyard_metrics" WHERE $timeFilter AND "collector_host" =~ /^$collector_host$/ AND "source_instance" =~ /^$source_instance$/ AND "subject_type" = 'service' AND "subject_id" = 'wersdoerfer_homepage' AND "source_system" = 'http_probe' AND "metric" = 'service.http_page_total_seconds' GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: HTTP Page Latency: Marina Adler Homepage

panels.description: Latest values grouped by metric, probe subject, raw URL, and probe host.

targets.query: SELECT last("value") FROM "graphyard_metrics" WHERE $timeFilter AND "collector_host" =~ /^$collector_host$/ AND "source_instance" =~ /^$source_instance$/ AND "subject_type" = 'service' AND "source_system" = 'http_probe' AND "metric" =~ /^service\.http_page_(ttfb_seconds|total_seconds|status_code|success|redirect_count)$/ GROUP BY "metric", "subject_id", "source_entity_id", "collector_host"

panels.title: Latest Probe Values

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "graphyard_metrics" WITH KEY = "collector_host" WHERE "subject_type" = 'service' AND "source_system" = 'http_probe' AND "metric" = 'service.http_page_ttfb_seconds'
list.label: collector_host
list.name: collector_host
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "graphyard_metrics" WITH KEY = "collector_host" WHERE "subject_type" = 'service' AND "source_system" = 'http_probe' AND "metric" = 'service.http_page_ttfb_seconds'

list.label: source_instance
